training_status: powerlifter/strength athlete, works with mobility coach

benefits.description: Hamstring/glute strain resolved after 1 month; was unable to sit on toilet without extreme pain prior
Rehabbed partial rotator cuff tear with wolverine stack combined with weekly mobility coaching; believes avoided surgery

protocol_notes: For acute injury dosed up to 1mg/day for a month. For chronic/rehab protocol uses lower dose for 6-8 weeks at a time then 2-3 week break. Rotator cuff rehab involved weekly mobility coach sessions alongside peptides.
